title: vinta-ai-workflows sub-agent definition
description: Vendor-agnostic sub-agent definition. Lives at `ai-tools/agents/<name>.yaml` in a target project. Read by `setup-ai-tools.mjs` which emits per-vendor copies (Claude markdown, Cursor markdown, Copilot `.agent.md`, Codex TOML). One file per agent. See schemas/README.md for versioning rules.

schema_version.description: Schema major version. Bumped only on breaking changes.

name.description: Agent identifier. Lowercase kebab-case. Used as filename stem and as the agent's slash-command name.

description.description: One-line role + when-to-use summary. Used in vendor frontmatter for delegation hints.

access.description: Read/write capability profile. Drives vendor-specific defaults (Claude `tools:`, Cursor `readonly:`, Codex `sandbox_mode`, Copilot `tools[]`).

body.description: Markdown body of the agent prompt. Multi-line literal block. Becomes the body of every per-vendor file emitted by `setup-ai-tools.mjs`.

claude-tools.description: Optional shorthand: top-level Claude Code `tools:` value. When set, overrides the default derived from `access`. Equivalent to `overrides.claude.tools`.

model.description: Optional default model preference (per-vendor when present at top level). Vendor-specific overrides win.

is_background.description: Cursor-only top-level flag â€” agent runs as a background task.

overrides.description: Vendor-specific overrides. Each vendor's keys mirror what the vendor's frontmatter accepts.
